steps.title: Identify the growth multiplier
steps.content: An $8\%$ annual increase means one year after the starting point the population is $\left(3000\right)(1.08)=3240$. Use the values at $x=0$ and $x=1$ directly.

steps.title: Build the exponential formula
steps.content: The initial population is $3000$, so the starting factor is $3000$. The annual multiplier is $1.08$, so after $x$ years the model is $$p=3000(1.08)^x.$$ This matches the correct answer, D.
